findings.title: Morning update
findings.summary:
Morning update

    
    

        
    
                Good morning Middle East Eye readers,

Diplomatic activity around the Iran conflict is intensifying as Donald Trump heads to Beijing for talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping, saying he wants a “good deal” with Tehran while ruling out an Iranian nuclear program. 

China is also pushing Pakistan to continue mediation efforts between Washington and Tehran, even as fighting and military pressure continue across the region.

Meanwhil...

findings.summary:
China urges Pakistan to intensify Iran-US mediation efforts

    
    

        
    
                Chinese foreign minister Wang Yi urged Pakistan to intensify mediation efforts between the United States and Iran to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz, according to Xinhua News Agency.

During a phone call, Pakistani foreign minister Mohammad Ishaq Dar briefed Wang on Islamabad’s recent mediation efforts and thanked China for its support.

findings.title: China presses Pakistan to deepen Iran mediation ahead of Trump-Xi talks
findings.summary:
China’s foreign minister Wang Yi on Tuesday urged Pakistan to ramp up mediation efforts in the Iran crisis, as the war threatens to overshadow US President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing.
In a call with his Pakistani counterpart Ishaq Dar, Wang lauded Pakistan’s efforts in facilitating negotiations between Washington and Tehran and helping to extend the ceasefire. But he also called for Pakistan to “step up its mediation efforts to contribute to … the opening of the Strait of Hormuz and the...

China presses Pakistan to deepen Iran mediation ahead of Trump-Xi talks | China’s foreign minister Wang Yi on Tuesday urged Pakistan to ramp up mediation efforts in the Iran crisis, as the war threatens to overshadow US President Donald Trump’s visit to Beijing.
In a call with his Pakistani counterpart Ishaq Dar, Wang lauded Pakistan’s efforts in facilitating negotiations between Washington and Tehran and helping to extend the ceasefire. But he also called for Pakistan to “step up its mediation efforts to contribute to … the opening of the Strait of Hormuz and the...

findings.summary:
ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Tuesday discussed regional developments and peace efforts regarding the Middle East conflict with Azerbaijan’s President Ilham Aliyev.
According to a statement issued by the Prime Minister’s Office (PMO), the two leaders held a phone call on Tuesday to discuss peace efforts in the region, while also reaffirming the bilateral ties between the two countries.
The two leaders exchanged greetings and reaffirmed the “strong fraternal bonds of friendship” ...

findings.title: Geopolitical shift in ME
findings.summary: US PRESIDENT Donald Trump is doing what he does best: keeping the world guessing with his puzzling declarations. He has rejected Iran’s latest proposal for peace talks, stating, “I don’t like it”. He has also threatened Iran with more strikes. He claims the ceasefire is now on “massive life support”. At the same time, he has asserted that he has achieved all his war objectives. What are we to make of such, often conflicting, statements? One thing that can be deduced from Trump’s declarations ...

findings.title: Middle East live: Trump says stopping Iran's nuclear programme outweighs Americans' economic pain
findings.summary: US President Donald ⁠Trump said he expects to have a "long talk" about Iran with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping when he arrives in Beijing on Wednesday for a highly anticipated summit. Trump said Americans’ financial struggles were not a factor in his decision-making as he seeks to negotiate an end ​to the war, adding that preventing Tehran from acquiring a nuclear weapon is his top priority. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
findings.text: Middle East live: Trump says stopping Iran's nuclear programme outweighs Americans' economic pain | US President Donald ⁠Trump said he expects to have a "long talk" about Iran with his Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping when he arrives in Beijing on Wednesday for a highly anticipated summit. Trump said Americans’ financial struggles were not a factor in his decision-making as he seeks to negotiate an end ​to the war, adding that preventing Tehran from acquiring a nuclear weapon is his top priority. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

findings.title: Iran warns US to accept peace plan or risk collapse of Middle East truce
findings.summary: Iran’s chief negotiator said on Tuesday that Washington must accept Tehran’s latest peace plan or risk the collapse of the Middle East truce, after President Donald Trump warned the ceasefire was near failure. The war, triggered by US-Israeli strikes on Iran more than two months ago, has destabilised the region and rattled global markets.
findings.text: Iran warns US to accept peace plan or risk collapse of Middle East truce | Iran’s chief negotiator said on Tuesday that Washington must accept Tehran’s latest peace plan or risk the collapse of the Middle East truce, after President Donald Trump warned the ceasefire was near failure. The war, triggered by US-Israeli strikes on Iran more than two months ago, has destabilised the region and rattled global markets.

findings.title: Iran: Surge of political prisoners amid US-Israel war

findings.title: Iran says US must accept its peace plan or face 'failure'
findings.summary: Both sides have refused to make concessions and repeatedly threatened to resume fighting, but neither appears willing to return to all-out war. Iran sent its latest proposal in response to an earlier US plan, details of which remain limited.

findings.title: The shattered Iranian lives of Manije, Mohammad-Reza and Soroush, all killed by bombings
findings.summary: Before the Israeli-US bombings began, they were living as retirees and artists in different parts of Tehran. Until they met their deaths in their own homes. Tormented by distress, their loved ones abroad and in Iran recount their last conversations before fate took a tragic turn.

findings.title: Görünmeyen cephe açıldı: Gizli saldırılar düzenlendi! BAE’den sürpriz hamle, Mirage jetleri sahada mı?
findings.summary: Körfez’de dengeleri sarsacak yeni bir iddia gündemde. İran’a yönelik saldırılarda şimdiye kadar perde arkasında kaldığı düşünülen bir ülkenin, savaşın seyrini değiştirecek bir hamle yaptığı öne sürülüyor. Özellikle İran’daki kritik bir hedefe düzenlenen operasyonun ardından bölgedeki hesapların tamamen değişebileceği konuşuluyor. İran Araştırmaları Merkezi (İRAM) araştırmacılarından Oral Toğa, Hurriyet.com.tr'ye çok önemli bilgiler paylaştı.

İran Araştırmaları Merkezi (İRAM) araştırmacılarından Oral Toğa, Hurriyet.com.tr'ye çok önemli bilgiler paylaştı.

findings.title: Pentagon açıkladı: İşte savaşın ABD’ye maliyeti
findings.summary: ABD Savunma Bakanlığı (Pentagon) Mali İşlerden Sorumlu Bakan Yardımcısı Jules J. Hurst III, ABD/İsrail-İran savaşının bugüne kadarki maliyetinin yaklaşık 29 milyar dolara ulaştığını bildirdi.
findings.text: Pentagon açıkladı: İşte savaşın ABD’ye maliyeti | ABD Savunma Bakanlığı (Pentagon) Mali İşlerden Sorumlu Bakan Yardımcısı Jules J. Hurst III, ABD/İsrail-İran savaşının bugüne kadarki maliyetinin yaklaşık 29 milyar dolara ulaştığını bildirdi.

findings.title: Trump'ı CIA yalanladı: Gizli İran raporları ortaya çıktı! Füze üsleri yeniden aktif
findings.summary: CIA'in gizli istihbarat raporlarında, İran'da füze üslerinin yeniden devreye girdiği kaydedildi. ABD basınının ele geçirdiği raporlarda, Başkan Donald Trump'ın iddia ettiğinin aksine İran'ın Hürmüz Boğazı boyunca 30 füze üssünü operasyonel hale getirdiği bulgusu yer aldı. Trump, Çin'e hareket etmeden önce yaptığı açıklamada, anlaşma sağlanamazsa İran'a saldırıların yeniden başlayacağını belirtti.

findings.title: Hegseth: fears that stockpiles depleted are 'foolishly' overstated
findings.summary: In a Tuesday hearing, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth repeatedly rejected congressional concerns about depleting munitions stockpiles, dismissing them as “foolishly and unhealthily overstated.” “We know exactly what we have. We have plenty of what we need,” Hegseth told the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee. “Any munitions we're using, we know what we're trading off of to preserve capabilities, so we have maximum optionality across the globe, which we do.” The Defense Secretary later a...

We have plenty of what we need,” Hegseth told the House Appropriations Defense Subcommittee. “Any munitions we're using, we know what we're trading off of to preserve capabilities, so we have maximum optionality across the globe, which we do.” The Defense Secretary later a...

findings.title: 2 hearings, 0 justification for a $1.5 trillion military budget
findings.summary: Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Caine testified before the House and Senate Appropriations Committees on Tuesday ostensibly to justify the President’s request for an historic $1.5 trillion budget. Unfortunately, they offered no strategic justification for this nearly $500 billion increase in military spending and, instead, raised even more questions about the Pentagon budget and the cost of the war in Iran.What was most surprising about the hear...

findings.title: EN DIRECT - Moyen-Orient: nouvelle frappe israélienne sur l'autoroute au sud de Beyrouth
findings.summary: Mardi 12 mai, le ministre chinois des Affaires étrangères s'est entretenu par téléphone avec son homologue pakistanais pour « intensifier » ses efforts de médiation entre l'Iran et les États-Unis, et exprimer l'intention de son pays de continuer à le soutenir, a rapporté Chine Nouvelle. Ce mercredi, une nouvelle frappe israélienne a visé une voiture au niveau de Jiyeh, sur l'autoroute très fréquentée reliant Beyrouth au sud du Liban, a rapporté l'Agence nationale d'information.
findings.text: EN DIRECT - Moyen-Orient: nouvelle frappe israélienne sur l'autoroute au sud de Beyrouth | Mardi 12 mai, le ministre chinois des Affaires étrangères s'est entretenu par téléphone avec son homologue pakistanais pour « intensifier » ses efforts de médiation entre l'Iran et les États-Unis, et exprimer l'intention de son pays de continuer à le soutenir, a rapporté Chine Nouvelle. Ce mercredi, une nouvelle frappe israélienne a visé une voiture au niveau de Jiyeh, sur l'autoroute très fréquentée reliant Beyrouth au sud du Liban, a rapporté l'Agence nationale d'information.
